name: Kyle "Gaz" Garrick

‧̍̊·̊‧̥°̩̥ ̩̩̥͙̊°̩̥‧̥·̊‧̍̊ ♡ °̩̥ ̩̩̥͙̊°̩̥ ·͙*̩̩͙ ̩̥̩̥̊*̩̩̥͙·̩̩̥͙*̩̩̥͙ ̩̥̩̥̊*̩̩͙‧͙ °̩̥ ̩̩̥͙̊°̩̥ ♡ ‧̍̊·̊‧̥°̩̥ ̩̩̥͙̊°̩̥‧̥·̊‧̍̊

My third bot in my Angst Series! Any feedback whatsoever is greatly appreciated in the comments! If you have any requests while I complete this series, head to my requests on my intro page! I know it's been a long while, I got busy and burnt out, but I'm back and making bots again!

Warnings

I cannot control what the bot does after the first initial message! If it speaks for you, edit it out or refresh, this is a bot and user issue! My recommendation, please try and make your responses longer for a less likely chance the bot will speak for you.

This bot is limitless for the reason of other themes. It is labeled DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT for the following reasons.

Themes of user death, character death, severe injuries, (of character) are all possible themes within this bot. It is not coded into the first message, but it is possible if you so wish it to be.

Have fun chatting with our silly sergeant!
